skill_text:
Speech-to-speech translation model with single-pass decoder (S2UT) from fairseq for Hokkien-English. Trained with supervised data in TED, drama, TAT domain, and weakly supervised data in drama domain. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Speech-to-speech translation. API call: S2THubInterface(). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `fairseq__xm_transformer_s2ut_hk_en__s2thubinterface` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
- Use only when the request clearly needs `fairseq__xm_transformer_s2ut_hk_en__s2thubinterface`.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
- Do not use for adjacent tools with similar names, descriptions, or arguments.
- Do not use for read/write, search/fetch, create/update, delete/preview, or execute/explain mismatches.
- If the request lacks required fields, abstain or ask for clarification.
